Boettcher was only able to get 13 correct answers, so going into Final Jeopardy!" Holzhauer ($37,412) had nearly three times as much money as Boettcher ($13,200). Emma correctly answered, "What is Jeremiah?" Holzhauer also got the correct answer and bid $11,914, bringing his grand total for the first night to $49,326. Fans took to Twitter to discuss his dominant performance. It should be noted that there is a third contestant in the finals, Francois Barcomb. Unfortunately he ended the night with only $1,800 and it is highly unlikely he will pose much of a threat to the other juggernauts."
